description: Sought after RANCHER with full WALK-OUT BASEMENT in secure gated Belmont Ridge. Great floorplan that gives you the space of a house while still enjoying the carefree lifestyle of a strata development. Kitchen has plenty of cabinets and drawers with both an adjacent breakfast nook and dining room. Huge rec room below with a flex room for an office or crafts. Windows replaced in 2020. Rare connecting door from upstairs front bdrm into garage without needing to go outside. Best & private location in complex with large grassy area beyond the patio. Nice clubhouse with kitchen facilities and guest suites. Open to all ages and 1 dog or cat. Close to shopping, parks and EZ access to Hwy 1. Available for immediate occupancy.
